label: Al-Shabaab Territorial Control
contestNote: Al-Shabaab claims broader rural influence; SNA disputes any meaningful control figures
deltaNote: Despite losses, group maintains shadow governance in rural south/central

label: Annual Conflict Events (ACLED)
deltaNote: Increase driven by SNA/clan militia offensives and Al-Shabaab counter-attacks

label: Internally Displaced Persons
contestNote: 50,000+ newly displaced by SNA seizure of Baidoa (late March 2026); multiple aid agencies suspended operations in Bay Region
deltaNote: SNA seizure of Southwest State capital added new displacement wave atop existing drought/conflict crisis

label: Food Insecure Population
contestNote: 500,000+ displaced in 2026 (90% by drought); 2M in IPC Phase 4 Emergency; 1.85M children under 5 face acute malnutrition (~500K at SAM); HRP only 13.4% funded ($852M); 2025 Deyr harvest 83% below 30-yr avg; 125K more projected displaced Q2 2026
deltaNote: Al Jazeera gallery (Apr 27, 2026): over 500,000 Somalis displaced since Jan 1, 2026 — 90% by drought; WFP cut nutrition support from 400K to 90K mothers; 200+ health facilities closed since early 2025

label: Al-Shabaab Annual Revenue
source: UN Monitoring Group 2024 / Africa Center for Strategic Studies
contestNote: Includes Houthi-linked revenue sharing since 2024; FGS claims lower; charcoal, taxation, piracy, and extortion documented

label: AUSSOM Authorized Strength
source: UNSC Resolution (Nov 2024) / AU / EU EPF Apr 23, 2026
deltaNote: EU approved €75M under the European Peace Facility on Apr 23, 2026 — largest single EU contribution, bringing total EU support to ~€2.8B since 2007. AUSSOM operational Jan 1, 2025; Ethiopia excluded by FGS; Uganda threatened withdrawal after 20 Ugandan peacekeepers killed. US veto of UN cost-sharing resolution means EU funding is critical.

label: AFRICOM Airstrikes in Somalia (2026 YTD)
contestNote: At least 58 confirmed strikes in Somalia by Apr 23, 2026, per Antiwar.com's running count. 57th confirmed strike on Apr 21 targeting Al-Shabaab ~90km SW of Kismayo (PR #36382). 56th strike (Apr 17) hit ISIS-Somalia near Bosaso. Airwars documents credible civilian harm in multiple strikes. AFRICOM no longer reports casualty assessments.
deltaNote: Antiwar.com Apr 23 reports total of 58+ Somalia airstrikes in 2026. 2026 pace tracking to 200+/year — more than triple the prior annual record of 63 strikes in all of 2019.

label: SNA Estimated Strength
contestNote: Ghost soldier problem; actual combat-ready forces significantly lower; payroll fraud endemic
